app_description.message: Ad-free minimalist new tab. Alt+S bookmark, 3-channel sync, folder encryption, drag-drop and 8 languages.

first_run_guide.message: 💡 Activation Tip: To ensure S-Tab cloud sync and quick bookmarks work normally, if the browser prompts 'Restore settings' or 'Change back to original settings', please click [Keep Changes]!

search_placeholder.message: Type keywords, press Enter to search...

snav_search_placeholder.message: Type keyword to search added web pages...

snav_shortcut_tips.message: 💡 Press Alt + S on any web page (or click extension icon) to quickly add to S-Nav

chk_disable_search.message: Disable global search for encrypted folder

supabase_logged_out_banner.message: This channel is designed for general users. Simply register an account and click the confirmation link in your registration email to easily log in and enjoy automatic multi-device cloud synchronization.

nas_logged_out_banner.message: This channel is designed for advanced users who have deployed WebDAV services on Synology NAS, QNAP NAS, ASUS routers, or self-built OpenWrt. System will automatically build sync folders after logging in.

webdav_logged_out_banner.message: This channel is designed for advanced users. Easily sync data via cloud storage providers that support standard WebDAV protocols.

auto_sync_hint.message: Check this option, click 'Save & Close', then your data will automatically sync between local & cloud in real-time.

force_upload_hint.message: Forcefully upload local data to overwrite server-side data

force_download_hint.message: Forcefully download server-side data to overwrite local data

placeholder_nas_path.message: Shared Path (Optional, leave blank to use home directory)

jianguo_password_guide.message: 🔑 Password Guide: Please log in to Jianguoyun Web ➔ Account Info ➔ Security Settings ➔ Third-party App Management ➔ Add App to generate a dedicated authorization app password.

back_to_login_link.message: ← Already have an account? Log In

opt_enable_marquee.message: Turn on feature showcase scrolling bar in bottom-right corner

opt_enable_shortcut_tips.message: Show 'Press Alt + S shortcut to add page' tips

opt_more_features_hint.message: More custom preferences are coming soon to bring you a clean browsing environment.

about_p1.message: Welcome to S-Tab! This extension integrates URL Navigation and Quick Bookmarks to make your web browsing both clean and highly efficient.

about_feature_1.message: Quick Bookmarks (Alt + S): Press Alt+S on any web page to bookmark it instantly. Supports fast folder creation and categorization, far cleaner than native browser bookmarks.

about_feature_2.message: Three-Channel Cloud Sync: Built-in support for Supabase database, NAS private cloud, and standard WebDAV (Jianguoyun, Koofr, Yandex Disk, etc.) to keep your data safe and synced.

about_feature_3.message: Cross-Browser Sync: Share data effortlessly between Chrome, Edge, and other Chromium-based browsers. Once connected, your cards, folders, and settings align instantly.

about_feature_4.message: Double Password Protection: Folders can be protected by pattern gestures or character passwords. Pattern unlock is swift for daily access, while character passwords act as a secure recovery method.

about_feature_5.message: Enhanced Privacy Folders: Enhanced security features for private folders. You can hide card thumbnails, disable global search queries, or enable 'incognito window mode' to open links in separate incognito sessions.

about_feature_6.message: Deduplication & Lossless Merge: System automatically merges duplicate links and merges folders with identical names during manual backups, exports, or cloud syncing.

about_feature_7.message: Smart Icon Fetching: S-Tab automatically fetches high-resolution favicons. Click 'Change Icon' to rotate through 17 different high-quality icon sources.

about_feature_8.message: Fluid Drag & Drop: Hover over a card's top-left drag-handle to move it around. Open left & right folders simultaneously to move cards between directories instantly.

about_feature_9.message: Flexible Views & Tooltips: Switch between dynamic 'Grid' and 'List' views in folder panels. Hover over long names to reveal full titles via smart tooltips.

about_feature_10.message: Search History & Privacy: Integrated search engine box with smart search suggestions. Choose to enable or disable search history log tracking, with quick trash clearing.

about_feature_11.message: Background Tab Opening: Hold Ctrl while clicking a card to open pages quietly in a background browser tab without interrupting your current workflow.

support_text_p1.message: If this extension helped you, you are welcome to support the author.

support_text_p2.message: Donations are strictly voluntary and do not unlock any locked items.

support_text_p3.message: Transactions are safely processed by WeChat Pay; we do not collect or store any financial data.

enc_no_pwd_warning_p1.message: You have not set a master password yet,

click_here_to_setup.message: click here to set it up

enc_system_hint.message: S-Tab's security relies on dual character and gesture lock codes. After configuration, both can unlock folders or reset configurations mutually.

enc_has_pwd_view.message: You have configured gesture and character credentials. Both can unlock encrypted items, reset locks, or recover passwords for each other.

placeholder_char_pwd.message: Enter any characters or numbers (no length limit)

placeholder_char_pwd_hint_setting.message: Optional password hint (clue to help you remember)

wizard_gesture_confirm.message: Re-draw to confirm your gesture pattern

verify_subtitle.message: Draw gesture pattern or enter master password

sb_about_p1.message: Highly structured data sync scheme designed for S-Tab. Provides quick cross-device backup.

sb_about_p2.message: ✨ Highlight: No complex configuration needed. Just complete 'Register ➔ Check Email to Verify ➔ Log In' to keep your bookmarks and settings automatically aligned.

sb_about_p3.message: 🔐 Security: Full encryption during transit. No third-party can access your isolated bookmark database.

sb_about_thanks.message:
🌟 Acknowledgement
Heartfelt thanks to the Supabase open-source team for their outstanding database stack!

nas_about_heading.message: 🛠️ Guide to WebDAV setup on common NAS & Routers:

nas_about_syno_li1.message: Log in to DSM, install and run 'WebDAV Server' via Package Center.

nas_about_syno_li3.message: HTTPS port 5006 is recommended. Ensure the user account has Read/Write permissions to their home folder directory.

nas_about_qnap_li1.message: Log in, go to Control Panel ➔ Applications ➔ Web Server ➔ WebDAV.

nas_about_qnap_li2.message: Check 'Enable WebDAV' and note the ports (HTTP 5080, HTTPS 5081).

nas_about_qnap_li3.message: In QNAP's shared path column, enter the exact shared folder directory name (e.g., /MySyncFolder/).

nas_about_router_li1.message: ASUS Routers: Enable AiCloud 2.0 ➔ Smart Access or WebDAV Shared folders.

nas_about_router_li2.message: OpenWrt: Ensure uwsgi-mod-webdav is installed or pull a standard WebDAV Docker image.

webdav_about_p1.message: Standard WebDAV syncing scheme completely controlled by you. Includes built-in directories lock.

webdav_about_heading.message: 🔧 Quick App Authorization Password Generation Guide:

webdav_about_li1.message: Jianguoyun (Recommended): Log in to the Web ➔ Account ➔ Security Settings ➔ Third-party App Management ➔ Add App to generate a dedicated 'App Authorization Password' (do not use your main login password).

webdav_about_li2.message: Koofr: Log in to Koofr ➔ Preferences ➔ Security ➔ App Passwords ➔ Create new app credentials.

webdav_about_li3.message: Yandex Disk: Log in to Yandex Account ➔ Passwords and Authorization ➔ App Passwords ➔ Create app password.

webdav_about_thanks.message:
🐳 Acknowledgement
Sincere thanks to the engineering teams at Jianguoyun and Koofr for providing standard high-quality WebDAV endpoints.

reset_warning_danger_alert.message: DANGER: This action will completely erase all URL bookmarks, folders, and settings from local storage. This cannot be undone!

reset_cloud_checkbox_hint.message: Checking this box and clicking [Confirm] will erase the data on both your local storage and the selected connected cloud accounts.

marquee_line_1.message: • Press Alt + S on any web page to quickly add to S-Nav, bypassing bloated browser bookmarks.

marquee_line_2.message: • Real-time seamless data sync between Chrome, Edge, and other browsers.

marquee_line_3.message: • Triple-channel backup: Supabase, NAS WebDAV, or cloud providers are always active.

marquee_line_4.message: • Smart deduplication: duplicate links are auto-skipped and folders merged safely.

marquee_line_5.message: • Toggle search history: turn on or off log entries, or clear all history logs.

marquee_line_6.message: • Fluid tooltips: hover over cards to read full names in Grid or List views.

marquee_line_7.message: • Dual folder locking: use character password or gesture pattern clues for total safety.

marquee_line_8.message: • Dual folders view: open left and right panels side-by-side to drag cards instantly.

marquee_line_9.message: • Ultimate folder privacy: hide previews, disable global search, or open in incognito.

marquee_line_10.message: • Backstage tab browsing: hold Ctrl while clicking to open new tabs quietly.

marquee_line_11.message: • Current S-Tab Version: 3.2.3 | Customize info: SenpaiX Customize | Contact: senpaix@163.com

confirm_remove_global_encryption_msg.message: Clicking Confirm will delete your configured master character password and gesture pattern. Additionally, all encrypted folders in S-Nav will be decrypted automatically, and master security verification for system reset or daily settings will be disabled. This cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to proceed?

sync_mode_passive_desc.message: Zero background standby consumption. Only aligns data on browser launch, new tab open, switching back to tab, or manual refresh. Supports manual sync by clicking 🔄 on the right of S-Nav header.

sync_mode_active_desc.message: Automatic background active probe alignment to achieve second-level consistency, but incurs continuous network and background resource overhead.

about_changelog_li1.message: Optimize Cloud Sync Mechanism: Introduced 'Server Clock Skew Calibration' and 'LWW (Last Write Wins) Timestamp Comparison' algorithms, combined with the 'Tombstone deletion marker' mechanism. It precisely calibrates timezone differences during multi-device synchronization and intelligently recognizes folder/card movements, renames, offline creations, and deletions, resolving multi-device data conflicts, out-of-order lists, and unexpected resurrection of deleted cards to ensure lossless, second-level consistent data alignment.

about_changelog_li2.message: Right-click Context Menu Support: Right-click on any empty area of any webpage to find the 'Add to S-Nav' option. It instantly summons the folder category selection popup, matching shortcut-key and extension icon clicks identically.

about_changelog_li3.message: If the Alt + S shortcut fails, please navigate to [S-Tab Settings - Extension Management] -> [Keyboard Shortcuts] to re-register the Alt+S shortcut key.

toast_no_sync_channel.message: Tip: Currently not connected or logged into any cloud synchronization channel. Please configure and log in first!
